subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Lord! Consider thou the consummate wisdom of God, that thou art from the cradle of India and we from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده پروردگار ملاحظه نما حکمت بالغه الهی را که تو از مهد هندی و ما از
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @connection between material and spiritual worlds, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
